stem: You are travelling along the right lane of a four lane highway. You see an emergency vehicle pulled over with its lights flashing ahead. Which of the following are true? 你正沿着一条四车道高速公路的右车道行驶。你看到一辆紧急车辆停在路边，其灯光在前方闪烁。以下哪项是真的？

stem: Which of the following is true about road work zones? 关于道路施工区，下列正确的是？
options: You must observe work zone speed limits; speeding fines you receive here may be doubled 你必须遵守作业区的限速；你收到的超速罚单可能会加倍
Road work zone speed limits are not enforced 道路施工区的限速不是强制的
After being waved through a work zone, you should drive quickly to avoid holding up traffic 通过道路施工区后，你应该开快车以免阻碍交通
None of the above 以上都不对

道路施工区的限速不是强制的

stem: What should you do if fog closes in completely while driving, and visibility is reduced to near zero ____. 如果在行驶中大雾导致能见度降为零，你应该怎么做?
options: Carefully pull as far off the road as possible, and stop 小心把车驶离公路，尽可能远离路边停车
Increase the speed and take a detour 加速并绕行
Use low-beams 打开近光灯
Use high-beams 打开远光灯
stem_en: What should you do if fog closes in completely while driving, and visibility is reduced to near zero ____.
stem_zh: 如果在行驶中大雾导致能见度降为零，你应该怎么做?
options_en: Carefully pull as far off the road as possible, and stop
Increase the speed and take a detour
options_zh: 小心把车驶离公路，尽可能远离路边停车

stem: Two cars have parked outside of a fire station. Which of the following is most true? 有两辆汽车停在了一个消防站的外面。以下哪项是最正确的？

Car A must remain at least 20ft from the driveway, and Car B must remain at least 75ft from the driveway A车必须保持离车道至少20英尺，B车必须保持离车道至少75英尺
